name: Arr Planner Co., Ltd.
summary: Arr Planner Co., Ltd. engages in the custom-built housing and real estate businesses in Japan. It builds and sells customized homes; and new detached houses. The company also offers remodeling and renovation, exterior, housing rental, used house regeneration, and commercial architectural design services. In addition, it provides real estate property buying, selling, and brokerage services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
